dataCollected.title: Data Collected
dataCollected.body:
We collect the following data:

• Email address (for authentication)
• Password (hashed with Argon2, never stored in plain text)
• Display name (optional)
• User preferences (language, timezone, reminder frequency and time)
• Push notification tokens (for sending reminders)

purposes.title: Purposes of Processing
purposes.body:
Your data is used for:

• Managing your user account
• Sending notifications and reminders based on your preferences
• Personalizing your experience (language, timezone)

legalBasis.title: Legal Basis
legalBasis.body:
The processing of your data is based on:

• Your consent, given upon registration
• Legitimate interest for account security (password hashing, session management)

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.body:
Your data is retained for the duration of your account's existence.

You can export your data at any time (from your profile) and then delete your account. Deletion results in the permanent erasure of all your data.

hosting.title: Hosting and Data Transfers
hosting.body:
Your data is hosted by Hetzner Online GmbH, in Germany (European Union).

No data transfers outside the European Union are performed.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.body:
Under GDPR, you have the following rights:

• Right of access to your data
• Right to rectification
• Right to erasure (account deletion)
• Right to data portability (data export)
• Right to object
• Right to restriction of processing

You can exercise these rights directly from your profile in the app, or by contacting us at yassineelgherrabi@gmail.com.

cookies.title: Cookies and Trackers
cookies.body:
Offrii does not use any third-party cookies, advertising trackers, or behavioral analytics tools.

Only local authentication tokens are used to maintain your session.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.body:
This privacy policy may be updated. The date of the last update will be indicated below.

Last updated: March 8, 2026

dpo.title: Contact — Data Protection
dpo.body:
For any questions regarding the protection of your personal data, you can contact us at:
